en: When Rachel saw that she bore Jacob no children, she envied her sister. She said to Jacob, "Give me children, or I shall die!"
zh: 拉結見自己沒有給雅各生孩子，就嫉妒她的姊姊，對雅各說：“你要給我兒子，不然，我要死了。”

en: Jacob's anger was kindled against Rachel, and he said, "Am I in the place of God, who has withheld from you the fruit of the womb?"
zh: 雅各就向拉結生氣，說：“使你不能生育的是 神，我能代替他嗎？”

en: Then she said, "Here is my servant Bilhah; go in to her, so that she may give birth on my behalf, that even I may have children through her."
zh: 拉結說：“我的婢女辟拉在這裡，你可以與她親近，使她生子歸我，我就可以從她得到孩子 。”

en: So she gave him her servant Bilhah as a wife, and Jacob went in to her.
zh: 於是，拉結把自己的婢女辟拉給了雅各為妾，雅各就與她親近。

en: And Bilhah conceived and bore Jacob a son.
zh: 辟拉懷孕，給雅各生了一個兒子。

en: Then Rachel said, "God has judged me, and has also heard my voice and given me a son." Therefore she called his name Dan.
zh: 拉結說：“ 神為我伸了冤，也垂聽了我的聲音，賜給我一個兒子。”所以給他起名叫但。

en: Rachel's servant Bilhah conceived again and bore Jacob a second son.
zh: 拉結的使女辟拉又懷孕，給雅各生了第二個兒子。

en: Then Rachel said, "With mighty wrestlings I have wrestled with my sister and have prevailed." So she called his name Naphtali.
zh: 拉結說：“我與姊姊大大地相爭 ，我得勝了。”於是給孩子起名叫拿弗他利 。

en: When Leah saw that she had ceased bearing children, she took her servant Zilpah and gave her to Jacob as a wife.
zh: 利亞見自己停止生育，就把她的婢女悉帕給了雅各為妾。

en: Then Leah's servant Zilpah bore Jacob a son.
zh: 利亞的婢女悉帕給雅各生了一個兒子。

en: And Leah said, "Good fortune has come!" so she called his name Gad.
zh: 利亞說：“我真幸運。”給他起名叫迦得。

en: Leah's servant Zilpah bore Jacob a second son.
zh: 利亞的婢女悉帕又給雅各生了第二個兒子。

en: And Leah said, "Happy am I! For women have called me happy." So she called his name Asher.
zh: 利亞說：“我真有福氣，眾女子都要稱我是有福的。”於是給孩子起名叫亞設。

en: In the days of wheat harvest Reuben went and found mandrakes in the field and brought them to his mother Leah. Then Rachel said to Leah, "Please give me some of your son's mandrakes."
zh: 到了收割麥子的時候，流本出去，在田間找到了一些風茄，就拿來給他母親利亞。拉結對利亞說：“請你把你兒子的風茄分一些給我。”

en: But she said to her, "Is it a small matter that you have taken away my husband? Would you take away my son's mandrakes also?" Rachel said, "Then he may lie with you tonight in exchange for your son's mandrakes."
zh: 利亞回答拉結：“你奪去了我的丈夫，還算小事嗎？你還要奪去我兒子的風茄嗎？”拉結說：“好吧，今夜就讓他與你同睡，來交換你兒子的風茄。”

en: When Jacob came from the field in the evening, Leah went out to meet him and said, "You must come in to me, for I have hired you with my son's mandrakes." So he lay with her that night.
zh: 到了晚上，雅各從田間回來，利亞出去迎接他，說：“你要與我親近，因為我實在用我兒子的風茄把你雇下了。”那一夜，雅各就與利亞同睡。

en: And God listened to Leah, and she conceived and bore Jacob a fifth son.
zh: 神垂聽了利亞的禱告，利亞就懷孕，給雅各生了第五個兒子。

en: Leah said, "God has given me my wages because I gave my servant to my husband." So she called his name Issachar.
zh: 利亞說：“ 神給了我酬報，因為我把我的婢女給了我的丈夫。”於是給孩子起名叫以薩迦。

en: And Leah conceived again, and she bore Jacob a sixth son.
zh: 利亞又懷孕，給雅各生了第六個兒子。

en: Then Leah said, "God has endowed me with a good endowment; now my husband will honor me, because I have borne him six sons." So she called his name Zebulun.
zh: 利亞說：“ 神把美好的禮物送了給我，這一次我的丈夫要抬舉我了，因為我給他生了六個兒子。”於是給孩子起名叫西布倫。

en: Afterward she bore a daughter and called her name Dinah.
zh: 後來利亞又生了一個女兒，給她起名叫底拿。

en: Then God remembered Rachel, and God listened to her and opened her womb.
zh: 神顧念拉結，垂聽了她的禱告，使她能生育。

en: She conceived and bore a son and said, "God has taken away my reproach."
zh: 拉結就懷孕，生了一個兒子，說：“ 神把我的恥辱除去了。”

en: And she called his name Joseph, saying, "May the LORD add to me another son!"
zh: 於是給孩子起名叫約瑟，說：“願耶和華再給我一個兒子。”

en: As soon as Rachel had borne Joseph, Jacob said to Laban, "Send me away, that I may go to my own home and country.
zh: 拉結生了約瑟以後，雅各對拉班說：“請你讓我走吧，我好回到自己的地方，自己的故鄉去。

en: Give me my wives and my children for whom I have served you, that I may go, for you know the service that I have given you."
zh: 請你把我服事你所得的妻子和兒女都給我，讓我回去；我怎樣服事了你，你是知道的。”

en: But Laban said to him, "If I have found favor in your sight, I have learned by divination that the LORD has blessed me because of you.
zh: 拉班對他說：“我若蒙你賞臉，請你不要走，因為我得了神旨，知道耶和華賜福給我，是因你的緣故。”

en: Name your wages, and I will give it."
zh: 他又說：“請你定你的工資吧，我必給你。”

en: Jacob said to him, "You yourself know how I have served you, and how your livestock has fared with me.
zh: 雅各對拉班說：“我怎樣服事了你，你的牲畜在我手裡情形怎樣，你是知道的。

en: For you had little before I came, and it has increased abundantly, and the LORD has blessed you wherever I turned. But now when shall I provide for my own household also?"
zh: 我沒來以前，你所有的很少，現在卻大大地增加了；耶和華隨著我的腳蹤賜福給你。現在，我甚麼時候才能興家立業呢？”

en: He said, "What shall I give you?" Jacob said, "You shall not give me anything. If you will do this for me, I will again pasture your flock and keep it:
zh: 拉班問：“我該給你甚麼？”雅各回答：“你甚麼也不必給我；只要你答應我這一件事，我就繼續牧放看守你的羊群。

en: let me pass through all your flock today, removing from it every speckled and spotted sheep and every black lamb, and the spotted and speckled among the goats, and they shall be my wages.
zh: 今天我要走遍你的羊群，凡有斑點的羊、黑色的綿羊和有斑點的山羊，都挑出來，作為我的工資。

en: So my honesty will answer for me later, when you come to look into my wages with you. Every one that is not speckled and spotted among the goats and black among the lambs, if found with me, shall be counted stolen."
zh: 日後你來查看我的工資的時候，我好對你證明我的公道。凡在我手裡沒有斑點的山羊，或不是黑色的綿羊，都算是我偷來的。”

en: Laban said, "Good! Let it be as you have said."
zh: 拉班回答：“好吧，就照你的話去作。”

en: But that day Laban removed the male goats that were striped and spotted, and all the female goats that were speckled and spotted, every one that had white on it, and every lamb that was black, and put them in charge of his sons.
zh: 當日，拉班把有條紋和有斑點的公山羊、有斑點和有白紋的母山羊，以及所有黑色的綿羊，都挑出來交在自己的眾子手裡。

en: And he set a distance of three days' journey between himself and Jacob, and Jacob pastured the rest of Laban's flock.
zh: 又使自己和雅各之間相距有三天的路程。雅各就牧放拉班其餘的羊群。

en: Then Jacob took fresh sticks of poplar and almond and plane trees, and peeled white streaks in them, exposing the white of the sticks.
zh: 雅各拿楊樹、杏樹和楓樹的嫩枝子，把樹皮剝成白色的條紋，使枝子露出白的部分來。

en: He set the sticks that he had peeled in front of the flocks in the troughs, that is, the watering places, where the flocks came to drink. And since they bred when they came to drink,
zh: 然後把剝了皮的枝子插在水溝和水槽裡，枝子正對著來喝水的羊群。羊群來喝水的時候，就彼此交配。

en: the flocks bred in front of the sticks and so the flocks brought forth striped, speckled, and spotted.
zh: 羊群對著枝子交配，就生下有條紋和有斑點的小羊來。

en: And Jacob separated the lambs and set the faces of the flocks toward the striped and all the black in the flock of Laban. He put his own droves apart and did not put them with Laban's flock.
zh: 雅各把羊羔分別出來，使拉班的羊，對著這些有條紋的和所有黑色的羊。他為自己另組羊群，不把牠們放在拉班的羊群中。

en: Whenever the stronger of the flock were breeding, Jacob would lay the sticks in the troughs before the eyes of the flock, that they might breed among the sticks,
zh: 到了肥壯的羊群要交配的時候，雅各就在羊群的面前把枝子插在水溝裡，使牠們在枝子中間彼此交配。

en: but for the feebler of the flock he would not lay them there. So the feebler would be Laban's, and the stronger Jacob's.
zh: 但當瘦弱的羊群交配的時候，雅各就不插枝子。這樣，瘦弱的就歸拉班，肥壯的就歸雅各。

en: Thus the man increased greatly and had large flocks, female servants and male servants, and camels and donkeys.
zh: 於是，雅各變得非常富有，擁有很多羊群、僕婢、駱駝和驢。
